generated_oml:
instance ACCSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) domain environment for teleoperated 1/10-scale autonomous vehicle"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity hosting sensor data processing and automotive functions including Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity managing data and control mechanisms"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity containing 3D Visualization and Control Panel ROS2 packages"
]

instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor providing point cloud data for obstacle detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensors providing real-time dynamics data including speed, position, and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Transmission of raw LiDAR point cloud data via ROS2 and UDP over Wi-Fi"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Transmission of vehicle state data including speed and position via ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time vehicle state information including speed, position, and steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslationFE, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracksDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Transmission of structured object tracks via ROS2"
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks for path planning and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTracksDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ThreeDVisualizationPackage, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringAndTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for clustering and tracking LiDAR point cloud data into structured object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for serializing data with unit conversions according to ISO 23247 standard"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "External processing component for ACC lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and actuation commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for collecting sensor data from physical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationPackage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for 3D visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ControlPanelPackage : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 package for remote control of ACC system via UI"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "User interface for real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, detected object tracks, along with data saving and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTracksVisualization, DataSaving, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "External processing of ACC system's lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance, and actuation commands to alleviate on-board ECU constraints"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedCalculation, ActuationCommandGeneration
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and issue emergency braking commands via UI for operational monitoring and troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisable, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data including speed and position"
]

instance ObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of detected object tracks from LiDAR data"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Save vehicle state and object track data to storage for later analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generate detailed reports from collected vehicle data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicles using object tracks and vehicle state data"
]

instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of appropriate speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommandGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of actuation commands for throttle, brake, or steering based on ACC calculations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC system via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issue emergency braking command to vehicle via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the ACC Controlling FE, including motor and steering actuation signals, are serialized and translated via the ISO 23247 Data Translation FE. Commands are transmitted through ROS2 for internal software components and UDP over Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication to physical actuators."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization between physical and digital components is maintained at 100 ms accuracy due to hardware constraints, despite industry standards for safety-critical vehicular applications typically mandating stricter synchronization (e.g., <100 ms). This temporal granularity supports computation offloading and ensures coordinated device operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin architecture follows ISO 23247 Reference Architecture (RA), organizing components into Physical Twin, Digital Twin, and User Entities. Each Functional Entity (FE) is implemented as a ROS2 package with associated nodes. Notably, the Physical Twin Entity deviates from ISO 23247 by hosting general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) rather than being limited to resource-specific operations as in the standard's OME. This structure ensures entity-specific deployment on distinct hardware while maintaining component integration via ROS2."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication occurs over Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard (Part 2: Reference Architecture), defining entity-based structure with Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Interoperability is achieved using OPC Unified Architecture for data collection and device control functions."
]
